description_long: This object is a stylized, compact airplane with a rounded fuselage painted in alternating blue and orange colors. The nose is bulbous and features a small protruding rod, while the cockpit is centrally located and covered by a domed, transparent canopy. The wings are short, straight, and mid-mounted, each supporting a cylindrical engine nacelle beneath. The tail section is distinctive, with a V-tail configuration and a central exhaust port, giving it a retro-futuristic appearance. Visible rivets and panel lines add to the mechanical detail, and the overall design suggests a small, possibly single-occupant craft.
description: A compact, blue and orange stylized airplane with a domed cockpit, mid-mounted wings, and a V-tail. Features include twin underwing engines and a retro-futuristic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, central cockpit dome, and symmetrical placement of the twin underwing engines.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cylindrical fuselage, domed cockpit, and the V-tail with a visible exhaust port.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the V-tail configuration, central exhaust, and the symmetry of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit dome, wing, engine nacelle, and tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, short wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with two upward-angled stabilizers and a central exhaust port.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Mid-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single domed canopy, likely single-seat.
